question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 22.00% on 2026-03-26 for the Metaculus question "Will the US and Iran agree to a ceasefire before May 2026?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP on "Will the US and Iran agree to a ceasefire before May 2026?" will be strictly above 22% on March 26. The CP is currently exactly at the threshold (22.00%), having risen from 20% on March 7. The situation is genuinely close to a coin flip: the mild upward CP trend and newly reopened backchannel communications (Witkoff-Araghchi, March 16) provide slight upward pressure, while both sides' public refusal to negotiate, Iran's extreme preconditions, Trump's "terms not good enough" stance, and declining Manifold ceasefire market prices provide slight downward pressure. With 271 forecasters and 9 days until resolution, the CP could easily fluctuate in either direction. I estimate approximately 50% probability, reflecting genuine symmetric uncertainty around the exact threshold.

factors.description: CP upward trend: 20% → 22% over one week (Mar 7 to Mar 14), suggesting momentum toward higher values
Backchannel communications reactivated (Witkoff-Araghchi, Mar 16) — a new positive development that could push forecasters to update upward
Iran publicly refuses ceasefire and negotiations; hardline conditions (compensation, US base withdrawal, nuclear fuel cycle)
Trump says terms 'not good enough' — both sides posturing against near-term deal
Manifold ceasefire-by-March-31 market trending down (28% → 16.5%), suggesting declining ceasefire probability sentiment
CP is exactly at threshold (22.00%) — any random fluctuation could push it either way; symmetric uncertainty around threshold
Multiple regional mediators (Oman, Egypt, Pakistan, Turkey) pushing for dialogue — sustained diplomatic pressure
271 forecasters with recency-weighted median — new forecasts from March 14-26 will have strong weight and could shift CP

reasoning:
**Final Forecast: 0.50 (50%)**

This is a genuinely close-to-coin-flip meta-prediction because:

- **CP is exactly at the threshold** (22.00%), meaning even tiny movements determine resolution
- **Mild upward signals**: CP trend is +2pp/week, backchannel communications just reopened
- **Mild downward signals**: Both sides publicly refuse to negotiate, Manifold ceasefire markets declining
- **Net effect**: Near-zero directional lean with high uncertainty about which way the CP will move over the next 9 days

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42472) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-03-26 15:55:10 is higher than 22.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 22.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-03-26 15:55:10, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
